rows.label: qst703303_msg0001
rows.name:
You chased them off!
Sorry for the trouble.

rows.label: qst703303_msg0002
rows.name:
Phew, now I can finally step
outside with peace of mind.

rows.label: qst703303_msg0003
rows.name: What exactly happened here?

rows.label: qst703303_msg0004
rows.name:
Heh[ML:Dash ] You see, Shin.
When you've lived as long as I have...

rows.label: qst703303_msg0005
rows.name:
You're bound to end up with
a secret or two that you just can't
share with others[ML:Dash ]

rows.label: qst703303_msg0006
rows.name: A woman?

rows.label: qst703303_msg0007
rows.name:
H-Hey!
No jumping to conclusions! None at all!

rows.label: qst703303_msg0008
rows.name:
[ML:Dash ]Old man.
Minochi was just baiting you.

rows.label: qst703303_msg0009
rows.name:
Judging by how flustered you are,
could it be I hit the bullseye?

rows.label: qst703303_msg0010
rows.name:
Then, does that mean
there is someone you hold dear?

rows.label: qst703303_msg0011
rows.name:
Come to think of it, wasn't there
something about you lavishing
her with a ton of money[ML:Dash ]

rows.label: qst703303_msg0012
rows.name:
Oops, I just remembered
an errand I have to run!

rows.label: qst703303_msg0013
rows.name:
I have to go pick up Tahato.
Well then, if you'll excuse me!

rows.label: qst703303_msg0014
rows.name: See ya, old man.

rows.label: qst703303_msg0015
rows.name:
He was definitely hiding something.
Are you sure we shouldn't have
pressed him?

rows.label: qst703303_msg0016
rows.name:
Well, I'm sure it's complicated.
We'll just have to trust him on this.

rows.label: qst703303_msg0017
rows.name:
Looking at the old man really makes me think.
People, Divine Beasts, and of course, Blades...
We really aren't all that different, are we?

rows.label: qst703303_msg0018
rows.name: I'm sure we can all learn to get along.

rows.label: qst703303_msg0019
rows.name: [ML:Dash ]I agree.

rows.label: qst703303_msg0020
rows.name: You sure are positive, Adel.

rows.label: qst703303_msg0021
rows.name: It's all thanks to you guys.
